recentTweets.text: Mr. Trump, your billionaire friends might be happy with your Big Ugly Bill, but the nearly 4 million Americans who lost their healthcare are not. Your words are a clear indication of where your priorities lie.

Trump's speech tonight repeated the same debunked voter fraud claims — claims that multiple recounts and audits already disproved. There is no credible evidence of widespread voter fraud. 

This is a weak attempt to meddle in the upcoming midterms and distract the American people

Central Coast, thank you so much for joining my telephone town hall last night! I appreciated the questions, concerns, and ideas you shared. Hearing directly from you shapes the work I do here in DC.

ICE killed another innocent person and is lying to cover up what really happened.
